positions.title: AI/ML Engineer
positions.description: Increased fraud detection accuracy by 32% through transaction risk classification models developed using Python, TensorFlow, XGBoost, SQL, and Scikit-learn across enterprise payment processing and anomaly detection environments. Reduced customer query handling time by 40% after implementing LLM-powered automation workflows using LangChain, OpenAI APIs, FastAPI, and vector embeddings across enterprise financial support and service operations. Lowered real-time transaction scoring latency by 28% through scalable machine learning pipelines engineered using PySpark, Kafka, AWS SageMaker, and PostgreSQL across high-volume enterprise fintech processing environments successfully. Improved personalized product engagement by 22% through recommendation systems built using collaborative filtering, behavioral analytics, and customer segmentation techniques supporting enterprise digital banking and financial recommendation platforms. Increased predictive model precision by 26% using feature engineering, hyperparameter optimization, ensemble learning, and imbalance handling techniques across enterprise fraud analytics and machine learning classification workflows successfully. Accelerated production deployment cycles by 35% through CI/CD automation, MLflow workflows, Docker containerization, and Kubernetes orchestration supporting scalable machine learning deployment and monitoring across enterprise artificial intelligence environments. Improved real-time prediction throughput by 30% after developing FastAPI-based inference services integrated with AWS cloud infrastructure supporting secure enterprise machine learning and predictive analytics application environments successfully. Reduced operational investigation efforts by 25% through predictive anomaly monitoring solutions delivered collaboratively with analytics and engineering teams supporting enterprise transaction intelligence and financial compliance monitoring initiatives consistently.
achievements: Increased fraud detection accuracy by 32% through transaction risk classification models developed using Python, TensorFlow, XGBoost, SQL, and Scikit-learn across enterprise payment processing and anomaly detection environments.

Reduced customer query handling time by 40% after implementing LLM-powered automation workflows using LangChain, OpenAI APIs, FastAPI, and vector embeddings across enterprise financial support and service operations.

Lowered real-time transaction scoring latency by 28% through scalable machine learning pipelines engineered using PySpark, Kafka, AWS SageMaker, and PostgreSQL across high-volume enterprise fintech processing environments successfully.

Improved personalized product engagement by 22% through recommendation systems built using collaborative filtering, behavioral analytics, and customer segmentation techniques supporting enterprise digital banking and financial recommendation platforms.

Increased predictive model precision by 26% using feature engineering, hyperparameter optimization, ensemble learning, and imbalance handling techniques across enterprise fraud analytics and machine learning classification workflows successfully.

Accelerated production deployment cycles by 35% through CI/CD automation, MLflow workflows, Docker containerization, and Kubernetes orchestration supporting scalable machine learning deployment and monitoring across enterprise artificial intelligence environments.

Improved real-time prediction throughput by 30% after developing FastAPI-based inference services integrated with AWS cloud infrastructure supporting secure enterprise machine learning and predictive analytics application environments successfully.

Reduced operational investigation efforts by 25% through predictive anomaly monitoring solutions delivered collaboratively with analytics and engineering teams supporting enterprise transaction intelligence and financial compliance monitoring initiatives consistently.

positions.title: Machine Learning Engineer
positions.description: Improved customer risk prediction accuracy by 27% through machine learning models developed using Python, SQL, XGBoost, and Scikit-learn supporting banking analytics, forecasting, and enterprise financial decision making operations successfully. Reduced manual data preparation efforts by 38% after building ETL and preprocessing pipelines using Pandas, PySpark, and SQL across enterprise analytics, machine learning training, and validation environments consistently. Increased document processing efficiency by 33% through NLP-based classification and sentiment analysis solutions implemented using Transformers, TensorFlow, and NLTK across enterprise compliance and reporting workflows successfully. Improved financial forecasting reliability by 24% using ARIMA, Prophet, TensorFlow, and LSTM-based time series forecasting models supporting transaction trend analysis and predictive planning across enterprise reporting systems effectively. Increased model evaluation consistency by 29% through hyperparameter optimization, feature selection, cross validation, and performance assessment using RMSE, AUC, precision-recall, and F1-score evaluation metrics across analytics initiatives. Reduced production deployment timelines by 31% after developing REST-based machine learning APIs using Flask, FastAPI, Docker, and AWS EC2 supporting scalable predictive analytics integration across enterprise application environments successfully. Improved experiment reproducibility by 34% using MLflow-based model tracking, deployment automation, monitoring workflows, and version management across enterprise machine learning development and operational environments consistently. Reduced fraud investigation turnaround time by 21% through predictive analytics and customer intelligence solutions delivered collaboratively with analytics, engineering, and stakeholder teams supporting enterprise financial technology modernization initiatives successfully.

Reduced fraud investigation turnaround time by 21% through predictive analytics and customer intelligence solutions delivered collaboratively with analytics, engineering, and stakeholder teams supporting enterprise financial technology modernization initiatives successfully.
